description_long: This is a modern, round bed with a low-profile, circular white frame and a curved, upholstered headboard that wraps partially around the back. The bed features a light blue mattress with two matching pillows, giving it a soft and inviting appearance. On either side of the bed are two sleek, cylindrical black nightstands with open shelving and a glass top, adding a contemporary touch. The headboard is padded and appears to be upholstered in a light fabric, providing both comfort and style. The overall design is minimalist and luxurious, suitable for upscale urban interiors or boutique hotel suites. The bed's unique round shape and integrated side tables make it a striking centerpiece in any modern setting.
description: A modern round bed with a curved upholstered headboard, light blue bedding, and two black cylindrical nightstands with glass tops.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular bed, curved headboard, two pillows, and both nightstands clearly.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the thickness of the headboard and the side profile of the nightstands.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the curved headboard and the rear sides of the nightstands.
description_view_3: Angled front-side view showing the bed's round shape, headboard curve, and the arrangement of the nightstands.
